zh.St Mary's Church, Shelton, Norfolk, Engl: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登
zh.Heacham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可希亞哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton於1373年出生在英國諾福爾可雪登時，他的父親Ralph De Shelton IV12歲，母親Alice De Uvedale22歲。他於1400年與Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness在英國諾福爾可雪登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年7月20日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton于1373年出生在英国諾福爾可雪登时，他的父亲Ralph De Shelton IV12岁，母亲Alice De Uvedale22岁。他于1400年与Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness在英国諾福爾可雪登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年7月20日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登。

nameMeanings.name: Shelton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton was born in 1373, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, his father, Ralph De Shelton IV, was 12 and his mother, Alice De Uvedale, was 22. He married Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness in 1400, in Shelton, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 July 1421, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton est né en 1373, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Ralph De Shelton IV, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Alice De Uvedale, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness en 1400, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton 1373 in Shelton, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Shelton IV 12 und seine Mutter Alice De Uvedale 22. Er hat 1400 in Shelton, Norfolk, England Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1421 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton è nato il nel 1373 nel Shelton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Ralph De Shelton IV, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Alice De Uvedale, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness nel 1400, nel Shelton, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 luglio 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Sheltonが1373年にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph De Shelton IVは12歳，母Alice De Uvedaleは22歳であった。1400年にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンでLady Catherine Barrett Baronessと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年7月20日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton(이)가 1373년 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Shelton IV(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Uvedale(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 7월 20일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton nasceu em 1373, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph De Shelton IV, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Uvedale, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness em 1400, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1421, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton родился в 1373 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph De Shelton IV было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Uvedale, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness в 1400 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 июля 1421 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton nació en 1373, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph De Shelton IV, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Alice De Uvedale, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness en 1400, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de julio de 1421, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
